## {.center}

This workshop is available at [https://github.com/BerndDoser/EDUCADO_Slurm_Workshop](https://github.com/BerndDoser/EDUCADO_Slurm_Workshop)


## Agenda

- Slurm Basics
  - Understanding HPC Clusters, Partitions and Resources
  - Submitting Jobs and Monitoring Progress
  - Requesting resources (CPUs, memory, time)

. . .

- MPI with Slurm
  - Parallel jobs across multiple nodes

. . .

- Slurm with [StreamFlow](https://streamflow.di.unito.it/)
  - Heterogeneous jobs with different resource requirements

---

{{< include slides/why-hpc.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/hits-cascade-cluster.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/hits-genoa-cluster.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-intro.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-architecture.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-workflow.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/sinfo.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/sbatch.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/sbatch-submit-job.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/squeue.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/scontrol.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/srun-interactive.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-fairshare.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-qos.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-job-arrays.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-mpi.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-gpu.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-heterogeneous.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-rest-api.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-reservations.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/slurm-containers.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/streamflow.qmd >}}

---

## Summary

- **SLURM** is a widely used job scheduler that manages resource allocation and job scheduling on HPC clusters.
- Understanding the architecture of **SLURM** and how to submit and monitor jobs is essential for effectively utilizing HPC resources.
- **Containers / Apptainer** can be used to create reproducible environments for HPC applications.
- **StreamFlow** provides a framework for managing heterogeneous jobs with varying resource requirements.

## References

:::{#refs}
:::

---

{{< include slides/hands-on.qmd >}}
{{< include slides/exercise_1.md >}}
{{< include slides/exercise_2.md >}}
{{< include slides/exercise_3.md >}}
{{< include slides/exercise_4.md >}}
{{< include slides/exercise_5.md >}}
{{< include slides/exercise_6.md >}}
